items.t: Data Center Battery Maker ZincFive to Merge With SparkLabs SPAC
items.d: ZincFive Inc., a specialized battery maker supplying data centers, has agreed to go public through a merger with a blank-check company backed by SparkLabs Group at a pre-money valuation of $600 million.

items.t: ASML to Cut Fewer Jobs Than Planned After Union Deal
items.d: Chip-equipment maker ASML Holding NV will cut fewer jobs than planned, with redundancies not expected to take effect until May 1, following negotiations with Dutch trade unions.
